posts.title: Développement : De la boîte manuelle au pilote automatique
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Un parallèle entre l'évolution de l'automobile et celle du développement informatique ces 25 dernières années. De la boîte manuelle sans direction assistée à la voiture électrique autonome, du code sans IntelliSense aux agents IA.

posts.title: Understanding IOptions<T> in .NET
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Master strongly-typed configuration in .NET with IOptions<T>, IOptionsSnapshot<T>, and IOptionsMonitor<T>. Learn validation, named options, reloadable config, and production best practices.

posts.title: Dependency Injection: Lifetimes, Composition Root, Decorators, and Anti-Patterns
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Master Dependency Injection in .NET with comprehensive coverage of lifetimes, composition root patterns, decorators, and common anti-patterns to avoid.

posts.title: Pourquoi un cercle est-il divisé en 360 degrés ?
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Découvrez les origines historiques et mathématiques du choix des 360 degrés pour diviser un cercle.

posts.title: The Darwin Incident
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Premier épisode de l'anime The Darwin Incident basé sur le manga de Shun Umezawa.

posts.title: Prototyping with AI Agents
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Exploring how AI agents like GitHub Copilot can accelerate development - creating multiple C# .NET libraries and samples during holiday break.

posts.title: JWT JSON Web Tokens: A Comprehensive Guide
posts.author: agriffard

posts.title: Organizing ASP.NET Configuration with WebApplicationBuilder Extensions
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Learn how to organize your ASP.NET application configuration using extension methods for better maintainability and separation of concerns.

posts.title: Good Practices in C# Web APIs: Avoiding Common Pitfalls
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Web APIs drive modern applications, but small mistakes can cause big problems. Learn about 20 common pitfalls in C# Web API development and how to avoid them for better performance, security, and maintainability.

posts.title: Mastering Mermaid.js: The Complete Guide to Creating Stunning Diagrams with Code
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Master the art of creating beautiful diagrams with Mermaid.js! From flowcharts to sequence diagrams, learn how to visualize complex concepts using simple text-based syntax that integrates seamlessly into your documentation workflow.

posts.title: Bootstrap
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: De la botte à l'amorçage, l'étonnante histoire du mot Bootstrap en informatique.

posts.title: Mnémoniques
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Découvrez comment les mnémoniques facilitent la mémorisation et comment créer les vôtres.

posts.title: The Pitt
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Ce que j'ai aimé dans les 2 premiers épisodes de la série The Pitt.

posts.title: Les approximations remarquables du nombre Pi
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Exploration des meilleures approximations fractionnaires du nombre π, de l'antique 22/7 aux fractions continues modernes.

posts.title: Building Resilient C# Applications
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Learn how to build resilient C# applications.

posts.title: Blazor Server vs Blazor WebAssembly: How to Choose
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Complete guide to choosing between Blazor Server and Blazor WebAssembly for your next project. Compare performance, deployment, and use cases.

posts.title: MVP award 2022
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: This year, my Microsoft MVP title has been renewed for the 10th time.

posts.title: Learn Kana
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Kana (仮名) refer to syllabaries used to write Japanese phonological units.

posts.title: Strategy Design Pattern
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Master the Strategy design pattern in C# with practical examples, best practices, and real-world implementations. Learn to create flexible, maintainable algorithms that can be swapped at runtime.

posts.title: Factory Design Pattern in C#: Complete Guide with Examples
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Master the Factory design pattern in C# with practical examples, best practices, and real-world implementations. Learn Simple Factory, Factory Method, and Abstract Factory patterns.

posts.title: Builder Design Pattern in C#: Constructing Complex Objects Step by Step
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Master the Builder design pattern in C# with fluent interfaces, method chaining, and practical examples. Learn to construct complex objects elegantly and maintainably.

posts.title: Je ne sais rien
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Ce que je sais, c'est que je ne sais rien.

posts.title: Singleton Design Pattern in C#: Thread-Safe Implementation and Modern Alternatives
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Master the Singleton design pattern in C# with thread-safe implementations, performance considerations, and modern dependency injection alternatives.

posts.title: Pangrams - When Every Letter Counts
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Explore the fascinating world of pangrams - sentences that contain every letter of the alphabet, from the classic "quick brown fox" to modern variations.

posts.title: The Principles of Software Craftsmanship - Building Excellence in Code
posts.author: agriffard
posts.description: Explore the fundamental principles of Software Craftsmanship that elevate programming from mere coding to an art form focused on quality, continuous learning, and professional excellence.
